name: Jiangsu Yuxing Film Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Yuxing Film Technology Co., Ltd manufactures and sells BoPET films in China. It offers PET films for solar cell backsheets, electrical insulation, sequins, printing, and heald and electronic applications, as well as optical films. The company's products and services are used in the fields of IT, LCD, solar cell module, textile industry, etc. Jiangsu Yuxing Film Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 2004 and is based in Changzhou, the People's Republic of China.
